sha_binding.verified_source_note: Implementation commit: bounded findExistingCombinations (afterSnapshotAt → partition pruning), per-league singleton + onWorkSettled terminal-release in the runner, ingest-league wiring, 4 focused tests, package test-script wiring, lane sync metadata. The following commit touches only docs/06_status/proof + docs/06_status/lanes paths; merge SHA binds at close.

pnpm_verify.note: All static checks (lint, type-check, build) green and all in-memory suites pass. One DB-backed apps/api test (t1-proof-awaiting-approval-review) flaked once with a LIVE statement timeout (`canceling statement due to statement timeout`) — collateral from the production DB being degraded by the very overlapping MLB cycles this lane fixes; it PASSED 5/5 on immediate retry. Not a code regression.

cases: singleton: a still-in-flight MLB cycle is not overlapped by the next cycle
terminal timeout: settled timed-out cycle releases the singleton + is terminalized failed
next league proceeds when an earlier league times out
findExistingCombinations is bounded by the snapshot window (old partitions excluded)

regression_tests.note: ingestor 202 tests / 198 pass / 0 fail (stable across two runs, 4 todo/skip); packages/db 237/237.

db_evidence.note: Read-only EXPLAIN-style evidence justifying the partition-pruning fix; no migration.
db_evidence.unbounded_plan: Append over ~48 partitions (EXPLAIN: 'Subplans Removed: 12' = future partitions only); matching rows live in the current-day partition p20260618.
db_evidence.bounded_plan: snapshot_at >= now - 72h prunes to ~3 recent daily partitions.
db_evidence.supporting_index: (provider_event_id, snapshot_at) exists per partition — no migration required.
db_evidence.live_failure_observed: MLB cycle: 'Failed to load existing provider offer history: canceling statement due to statement timeout'; up to 5 MLB cycles running concurrently; provider_offer_history MLB rows in last 6h = 0 at proof start.

runtime_proof.note: Live Supabase smoke (read-only diagnostics established root cause; no ingestion rows written by this lane). TAP summary embedded in verification.md.

operational_action.restart: Prod ingestor restarted via redeploy of 3336491a to clear the wedged/overlapping cycles; loop resumed (NBA/NFL/NHL succeeded, MLB cycling). Per PM: restart is NOT a fix — overlaps re-formed, which this lane resolves.

live_production_proof.reason: Only deployed runtime can prove: MLB cycle succeeds or fails closed within the bound; no overlapping MLB cycles; fresh provider_offer_history rows persist (incl. provider_participant_id); market_universe updates; stale_price_data no longer the dominant reject (or exact next blocker reported).
